title: AN ACT RENAMING THE LILOAN BRIDGE IN THE LONE DISTRICT OF SOUTHERN LEYTE AS PRES. DIOSDADO P. MACAPAGAL BRIDGE

chunks.text:
H. No. 4795; 106 OG No. 23, 3208 (June 7, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10050, March 19, 2010 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE LILOAN BRIDGE IN THE LONE DISTRICT OF SOUTHERN LEYTE AS PRES. DIOSDADO P. MACAPAGAL BRIDGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Liloan Bridge in the lone district of Southern Leyte shall hereafter be known as Pres. Diosdado P. Macapagal Bridge.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 20, 2010 and May 25,2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 19 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
